honest_boundary: This engine continuously PROPOSES and RANKS improvements. It AUTO-STAGES only the safe + reversible + canaried + selftest-gated subset (bounded config tunes, OFF-by-default new sources, additive watchdogs) as a SIGNED manifest through the existing pipe — the box's guardrail/canary/rollback owns the apply. Everything risky/irreversible/large is SURFACED here for your yes. It does NOT autonomously rewrite the system.

auto_safe_staged.title: Enrichment coverage low — add a free firmographics source
auto_safe_staged.problem: enrichment progress_pct=52.0 is under the 60% bar; coverage gap.
auto_safe_staged.proposed_change: Add a discovered free firmographics source (RDAP/registry) as an OFF-by-default opt-in enrich lane; measure lift on canary.
auto_safe_staged.expected_impact: Higher company-level coverage at zero marginal cost.
auto_safe_staged.auto_reason: passed allowlist + denylist + reversibility + structural bound checks

needs_human_decisions.title: BIG BET (monetization): Usage-tiered firmographic API (free tier + metered paid tiers)

items.desc: A third Certificate-Transparency log stream for redundancy + earlier business-birth events
items.rationale: More CT coverage = earlier discovery of new domains (TITAN timeline), zero cost.

items.desc: GLEIF LEI open data (legal entity identifiers, parent/child org structure)
items.rationale: Free authoritative legal-entity graph; firmographic only, public domain.
items.lawful_free: GLEIF Golden Copy is public-domain/free; no PII.

items.desc: Open company registry seeds (jurisdictional incorporation events)
items.rationale: Incorporation = a business-birth event we can fuse into the timeline.
items.lawful_free: Use only openly-licensed registry exports; firmographic only.

items.rationale: A funded org is a high-intent firmographic signal; fully public.
items.lawful_free: USAspending.gov is public-domain US gov data; no PII.

items.desc: Classify mail provider (Google Workspace / M365 / other) from MX records
items.rationale: Provider class sharpens deliverability + ICP scoring at zero cost.
items.lawful_free: Public DNS MX lookups; firmographic, no message content.

items.desc: Lightweight tech-stack inference from public HTTP response headers
items.rationale: Tech stack is a strong firmographic ICP lever; polite + cacheable.
items.lawful_free: Reads only public response headers within polite-crawl bounds.

items.desc: Add a vector-embedding entity-resolution lane to cut duplicate orgs
items.rationale: Could materially lift unique-org yield, but it is a large, stateful change.
items.lawful_free: Internal-only compute; no new external data.

items.desc: Move CT/registry intake from batch to a streaming consumer for lower latency
items.rationale: Lower discovery latency on Channel-1, but a non-trivial re-architecture.

items.desc: Usage-tiered firmographic API (free tier + metered paid tiers)
items.rationale: Turns the enriched graph into a recurring revenue surface.
items.lawful_free: Sells only lawful firmographic data we are licensed to redistribute.

items.desc: Real-time ICP-match alert upsell on top of TuaniChat (new-business triggers)
items.rationale: High-intent, time-sensitive alerts are a natural premium upsell path.
items.lawful_free: Alerts on lawful firmographic events; honors opt-out.

items.desc: Verticalized industry data packs (e.g. med-spa, HVAC) as packaged SKUs
items.rationale: Packaging by vertical raises willingness-to-pay vs a flat list.
items.lawful_free: Same lawful firmographic data, repackaged; no PII.
